data.body: B-UX implementation note from B-DM review: the library write API (create_prompt/update_prompt in rebar.llm.prompt_library) makes a freshly-authored criterion visible to registry.by_id()/load_criteria ONLY when its repo_root equals config.repo_root() (registry._descriptor_from_prompt reads config.repo_root). So the editor SERVER must invoke create/update under the SAME repo root the gate reads, else a newly-authored criterion won't surface. enumerate_library/enumerate_criteria expose {id, kind, title, description, inputs, outputs, is_overlay, execution_mode, category, source} for the pickers.
